alignments.json_text: Blackbuster Music, this is Heather. How can I help you?
alignments.wiki_text: Blockbuster Music, this is Heather, how can I help you?
alignments.proposed_text: Blockbuster Music, this is Heather, how can I help you?

alignments.json_text: Yes, do you carry Huberto Gugliacci?
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Yes, do you carry, uh, Huberto Gugliacci?
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Yes, do you carry, uh, Huberto Gugliacci?

alignments.json_text: Um, actually, I'm not sure. Can you hold on for a moment?
alignments.wiki_text: Um, actually, I'm not sure, can you hold on for a moment?
alignments.proposed_text: Um, actually, I'm not sure. Can you hold on for a moment?

alignments.json_text: No, I could not. Look, I need to know from you something. One question, please.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] No, I cannot. Look... I need to know from you something. One question, please.
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] No, I cannot. Look... I need to know from you something. One question, please.

alignments.json_text: One question.
alignments.proposed_text: One question.

alignments.json_text: Okay.
alignments.wiki_text: Okay.
alignments.proposed_text: Okay.

alignments.json_text: Is, uh, is your store equipped with, you know, Nanette Nununachi?
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Is, uh... is your store equipped with, you know... uh, Nannette Nunanacci?
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Is, uh... is your store equipped with, you know... uh, Nannette Nunanacci?

alignments.json_text: Um, I'd have to look in the computer. Can you hold on for a moment?
alignments.wiki_text: Um, I'd have to look in the computer. Can you hold on for a moment?
alignments.proposed_text: Um, I'd have to look in the computer. Can you hold on for a moment?

alignments.json_text: Hold on for a moment.
alignments.proposed_text: Hold on for a moment.

alignments.json_text: I do not have the time that it takes for you to...
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] I do not have the... the time that it takes for you to--
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] I do not have the... the time that it takes for you to--

alignments.json_text: I'm sorry, I cannot do it without looking up in the computer.
alignments.wiki_text: I'm sorry, I cannot do it without looking up in the computer.
alignments.proposed_text: I'm sorry, I cannot do it without looking up in the computer.

alignments.json_text: I'm afraid that's just not going to be good enough because of the urgency of the matter.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] I'm afraid that's just not going to be good enough, because... because of the urgency of the matter, you understand. Do you have Gilberto Babobucci?
alignments.proposed_text: I'm afraid that's just not going to be good enough because of the urgency of the matter.

alignments.json_text: Do you have Gerberto Bababuchi?
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] I'm afraid that's just not going to be good enough, because... because of the urgency of the matter, you understand. Do you have Gilberto Babobucci?
alignments.proposed_text: Do you have Gerberto Bababuchi?

alignments.json_text: You don't understand. I need to look in the computer.
alignments.wiki_text: You don't understand, I need to look in the computer. Instead of us arguing right now, I could look in the computer and save some time.
alignments.proposed_text: You don't understand. I need to look in the computer.

alignments.json_text: Instead of us arguing right now, I could look in the computer and save some time.
alignments.wiki_text: You don't understand, I need to look in the computer. Instead of us arguing right now, I could look in the computer and save some time.
alignments.proposed_text: Instead of us arguing right now, I could look in the computer and save some time.

alignments.json_text: What would you be looking for? I don't...
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] Sp... ma'am... what would you be looking for, I don't...?
alignments.proposed_text: [accented] Sp... ma'am... what would you be looking for, I don't...?

alignments.json_text: I'd look up his name and it would tell us if we carry it.
alignments.wiki_text: I'd look up his name and it would tell us if we carry it.
alignments.proposed_text: I'd look up his name and it would tell us if we carry it.

alignments.json_text: Whose name?
alignments.proposed_text: Whose name?

alignments.json_text: Huberto Girbiachi, who you're telling me.
alignments.wiki_text: Huberto... Gerbiacci... who you're telling me.
alignments.proposed_text: Huberto... Gerbiacci... who you're telling me.

alignments.json_text: No, look, I'm afraid, I don't know, who is this, you know?
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] No, look... I'm afraid, I don't know... who, who... who, who is this, you know? What... what are you saying, you know? I don't... I don't follow... you, frankly.
alignments.proposed_text: No, look, I'm afraid, I don't know, who is this, you know?

alignments.json_text: What are you saying? I don't, I don't follow you, frankly.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] No, look... I'm afraid, I don't know... who, who... who, who is this, you know? What... what are you saying, you know? I don't... I don't follow... you, frankly.
alignments.proposed_text: What are you saying? I don't, I don't follow you, frankly.

alignments.json_text: Who are you looking for? What artist are you looking for?
alignments.wiki_text: Who are you looking for?
alignments.proposed_text: Who are you looking for?

alignments.json_text: I said many, many years ago, I said to my son, I said, you know, you must, you must learn from the ways of Talet Petitucci.
alignments.wiki_text: [accented] I said... many, many years ago... I said to my son, I said, you know, you must... you must learn from the ways of... Towelette Petatucci.
